result.summary: Amplitude exposes authenticated HTTP APIs for analytics ingestion and management, an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://mcp.amplitude.com/mcp`, and the `@amplitude/wizard` CLI.
result.description: Amplitude is a product analytics platform for collecting event data, analyzing user behavior, managing experiments and feature flags, and governing product data. It also offers AI-assisted workflows such as MCP-based access to Amplitude content and analytics.

amplitude_project_api_key.label: Amplitude project API key
amplitude_project_api_key.setup: In the Amplitude web app, go to **Settings** → **Projects** → choose your project → **General**. Use **Manage** next to **API Key** to view/copy it. See [API Authentication](https://amplitude.com/docs/en/apis/authentication) and [Keys and Tokens](https://amplitude.com/docs/en/apis/keys-and-tokens).

amplitude_experiment_management_key.label: Amplitude Experiment Management API key
amplitude_experiment_management_key.setup: In Amplitude Experiment, select **Management API** in the left sidebar to create and manage a Management API key. See [Experiment Management API](https://amplitude.com/docs/en/apis/experiment/experiment-management-api) and [Keys and Tokens](https://amplitude.com/docs/en/apis/keys-and-tokens).

amplitude_scim_key.label: Amplitude SCIM key
amplitude_scim_key.setup: Set up SCIM provisioning in Amplitude and rotate the SCIM key from the SCIM provisioning settings. See [Keys and Tokens](https://amplitude.com/docs/en/apis/keys-and-tokens) and [Set up SCIM provisioning in Amplitude](https://amplitude.com/docs/en/admin/account-management/scim-provision).

amplitude_org_api_key.label: Amplitude organization API key
amplitude_org_api_key.setup: Open **Organization settings** → **API Keys** in Amplitude to locate your Organization API key. It is required for org-level APIs such as Audit Logs and DSAR. See [Audit Logs API](https://amplitude.com/docs/en/apis/audit-logs) and [Keys and Tokens](https://amplitude.com/docs/en/apis/keys-and-tokens).

amplitude_org_secret_key.label: Amplitude organization secret key
amplitude_org_secret_key.setup: Contact [Amplitude Support](https://amplitude.com/contact) with your Organization ID and request an Organization Secret Key. See [Audit Logs API](https://amplitude.com/docs/en/apis/audit-logs) and [Keys and Tokens](https://amplitude.com/docs/en/apis/keys-and-tokens).

amplitude_data_api_token.label: Amplitude Data API token
amplitude_data_api_token.setup: In Amplitude Data, go to **Settings** → **API Tokens** to create or revoke a token. The token grants the same Amplitude Data roles and permissions as your login. See [Keys and Tokens](https://amplitude.com/docs/en/apis/keys-and-tokens).

amplitude_mcp_oauth.label: Amplitude MCP OAuth account authorization
amplitude_mcp_oauth.setup: Use an MCP client that supports remote HTTP MCP servers with OAuth, connect it to `https://mcp.amplitude.com/mcp` (or `https://mcp.eu.amplitude.com/mcp` for EU), and sign in to your Amplitude account when prompted. See [Amplitude MCP Server](https://amplitude.com/docs/en/amplitude-ai/amplitude-mcp) and [How to connect Amplitude MCP to other MCP clients](https://amplitude.com/docs/en/amplitude-ai/amplitude-mcp/other-clients).
